businessContext_i18n.es: Tasa de interés con capitalización continua.

rules: All numeric inputs must be positive numbers.

suggestedActions: Verify inputs before making financial decisions.
Consult a licensed financial advisor for personalized advice.

description.short: Calculate continuous compounding future value — the theoretical maximum.
description.long: Calculate continuous compounding future value — the theoretical maximum.

short_i18n.en: Calculate continuous compounding future value — the theoretical maximum.
short_i18n.tr: Sonsuz Frequencyta bilesiklesen teorik Maximum Maturity Sonu Valueini hesaplar.
short_i18n.de: Zukunftswert bei kontinuierlicher Verzinsung berechnen – das theoretische Maximum.
short_i18n.fr: Calculer la valeur future avec capitalisation continue — le maximum théorique.
short_i18n.es: Calcular el valor futuro con capitalización continua — el máximo teórico.
short_i18n.ar: حساب القيمة المستقبلية للفائدة المركبة المستمرة — الحد الأقصى النظري.
